bridge.name: Ondo Tokenized Stocks
bridge.description: An Ondo Tokenized Stock is a blockchain token that gives you the same economic exposure as owning the underlying stock or ETF. Please read the documentation for more details.
risks: Custodial risks - Tokens are claims on structures holding the underlying equities via third-party custodians, whose failure or insolvency could delay settlement or cause loss of value.
Regulatory & compliance risks - Tokenized equities face evolving rules and may require whitelisting or eligibility, which can force restricted access, halted redemptions, or unwinding.
Liquidity risks - On-chain trading is 24/7, but mint/redeem may be limited or windowed, and in stressed markets token prices can deviate from the underlying equities.
Market access & redemption risks - Mint/redeem may be capacity-limited, whitelisted, or tied to market hours, which can block arbitrage and impair exits near NAV.
Valuation & NAV risks - NAV relies on pricing from on-chain markets or oracles that can be stale or manipulated, distorting marks and mint/redeem pricing.
